status_notes: Created 2026-07-09 to register ISO vocabulary/overview content (ISO/IEC 27000) under the reference type. Org metadata copied from the existing same-org entries under the control, entity, and methodology types.
notes: ISO publishes globally recognized standards, jointly with IEC for the ISO/IEC series (see iec.ch for standalone-IEC reference content). Under the reference type this namespace covers ISO's vocabulary/overview documents — chiefly ISO/IEC 27000, the overview-and-vocabulary standard for the 27000 (ISMS) family. ISO's control standards live under the control type (registry/control/org/iso.json) and its risk-management / disclosure methodologies under the methodology type.

match_nodes.description: ISO/IEC 27000 — Information security management systems — Overview and vocabulary

data.official_name: ISO/IEC 27000 Information security management systems — Overview and vocabulary
data.description: The overview-and-vocabulary standard for the ISO/IEC 27000 (ISMS) family. Clause 3 is the controlled vocabulary — the terms and definitions used across the whole series; the remaining clauses give an overview of ISMS concepts and the family of standards. Registered as a reference/glossary because clause 3 is the authoritative term source the rest of the 27000 series draws on.
data.notes: Current edition: ISO/IEC 27000:2018 (fifth edition). ISO publishes 27000 at no charge (one of the few gratis ISO standards) but retains copyright — it is not freely redistributable. Term-level data extracted from the licensed copy is held in CSA's private dataset repo, not published; the public resolver returns a license-required stub.
